channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
item.description: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.

item.title: Saylor and team overhaul Strategy's bitcoin metrics as bear market persists
item.description: New framework gives common shareholders a clearer view of net bitcoin exposure after preferred stock and convertible debt obligations

item.title: 🚨🗞️NEW: Crypto Groups Push for Clarity as 60 Votes Remain Elusive @DigitalChamber, @crypto_council and @BlockchainAssn are urging Senate leaders to bring the Clarity Act to the floor, even as the bill currently lacks the support to advance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBOQzZfU1QxaE14dW5VcVBaNHR1VmZ5YnJTM1oxYUU1OEZRaTNPcUdVLTJOc3NVeW9XSW9makhSVGt4OXNpRC1YWFRWWXBtajkweUpIYllyZTVvcjczYldyTW96ZldXUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨🗞️NEW: Crypto Groups Push…

item.title: Brazilian farmers tokenized dairy cows to get loans, bypassing bank lending limits
item.description: Smart collars monitor herd health in real time to prevent fraud, allowing local agricultural businesses to secure thousands in funding backed by livestock.

item.title: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
item.description: Thailand’s SEC filed a criminal complaint against Bitkub and two former directors over alleged false disclosures linked to a 2021 cyberattack involving $50 million in assets.

item.title: One integrated view of Strategy’s Bitcoin balance sheet and capital structure. The MSTR-BTC dashboard brings gross and net reserves, per-share economics, valuation, duration, floor, breakeven, hurdle, yield, and gain into a single framework. Live at Strategy - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9Ha2NYdzJjeGdnZkNDc09rRDVMV05PUG9Ibk1VQ3VwcWNTOVphRUFpVWdnZEF3N3VpZ1JPNllmQmRiT1dzS1JYN2RnTFU3b05LQzhwdFEtMzhXODA?oc=5" target="_blank">One integrated view of Strategy’s Bitcoin b…

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin's New $15M Quantum Defense Fund
item.description: Plus, the Clarity Act is no longer expected to progress before the August recess. And Vlad Tenev's X was hacked to post a meme coin...

item.title: India Orders GitHub to Take Down Jack Dorsey's Bitchat Amid Protests
item.description: The order gave GitHub three hours to pull three code repositories, citing the messaging app's use during protest internet shutdowns.

item.title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
item.description: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

item.title: EU hits Russia with massive 21st sanctions package targeting $120B crypto network
item.description: The EU is considering a ban on third-country crypto services providers for the first time and is targeting 14 crypto companies, which it has not named yet.

item.title: Crypto market maker B2C2 held sale talks with multiple potential buyers
item.description: The SBI-owned crypto trading firm is said to have attracted takeover interest from a number of suitors over the past 18 months, but valuation has been a sticking point.

item.title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
item.description: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

item.title: Crypto's institutional influx has killed the memecoin craze
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 24, 2026

item.title: A $5 billion cluster has formed in bitcoin options. It tells a bullish story
item.description: Bitcoin's $70,000 and $72,000 call strikes on Deribit have accumulated nearly $5 billion in open interest, with calls outnumbering puts by a significant margin.

item.title: Bitcoin settles near $65,000 as oil's march toward $100 fails to spook the market
item.description: BTC held just under $65,000 and crypto broadly rose on Friday even as Brent crude surged to $97.66, its highest since May, as the Iran conflict persists and traditional markets stay muted.

item.title: Poolin was bitcoin's biggest mining pool and now it's filing for bankruptcy
item.description: The Singapore-based company once controlled nearly a fifth of Bitcoin's global hashrate. Now it owes $173 million and is selling off what's left.

item.title: 🇺🇸 UPDATE: The Morgan Stanley Ethereum Trust has received an SEC effectiveness filing, marking another step forward in the registration process. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9pQ0N2YUMycFQzUUxncklick1IbzdQa3BTdEg0dDZDMkJjMkhIQS1EVDFSVDVHYzVNcnRBM2E3YVYzWF8zQ3pWMmg4Mm5FWnhvTDgzRFByclJNN19iTWg3eFlhd3M?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 UPDATE: The Morgan Stanley…

item.title: Bitcoin treasury companies sell up, repay debt, pivot to AI as share prices collapse
item.description: Falling share prices, debt obligations and difficult market conditions are forcing former bitcoin accumulators to sell their holdings and restructure operations.

item.title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
item.description: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

item.title: India orders takedown of Jack Dorsey’s bitcoin-linked messaging app Bitchat
item.description: The order targets Bitchat, an offline Bluetooth mesh app built to relay encrypted messages and bitcoin transactions, as 'Cockroach Janta Party' protesters in Delhi use mesh tools to communicate through internet shutdowns.

item.title: Samsung Wallet plans stablecoin support in digital payments expansion
item.description: Samsung Electronics plans to add stablecoin support to Samsung Wallet, expanding its mobile payments and rewards platform to include digital assets.

item.title: Philippine bank BPI plans stablecoin payments pilot
item.description: The Philippine bank is preparing a stablecoin settlement pilot intended to speed up and reduce the cost of overseas payments to Filipino remote workers.

item.title: BitMEX faces proposed class-action suit for theft, insider trading as crypto exchange shuts down
item.description: The complaint claims BitMEX designed a system to retain customer collateral and alleges an internal desk accessed private user data during server freezes.

item.title: BTC supply in profit eyes 60%, but analysis hints recovery may ‘roll back over’
item.description: Bitcoin supply profitability improved versus its 2026 low, but analysis warned that a fake recovery had already broken down at the start of June.

item.title: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
item.description: The "GCottrell93" account bet the funds on Trump's election win and cashed out the profit, though who paid in and who collected is unclear.

item.title: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report
item.description: Mirae Asset reportedly plans to use the South Korean crypto exchange as a hub for tokenized assets, stablecoins and digital finance.

item.title: Ripple launches Mint to expand institutional access to RLUSD
item.description: Ripple launches Mint to expand RLUSD access for institutions as the stablecoin’s market cap approaches $1.6 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin mining pool Poolin files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
item.description: Bitcoin miner Poolin filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy and initiated a $52 million sale of its two West Texas mining sites as part of its future creditor recovery program.

item.title: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
item.description: The EU will bar Belarusian nationals and residents from owning, controlling or managing exchanges and other MiCA-regulated crypto firms from Aug. 25.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin gives up gains, falls below $64,000 as stocks retreat
item.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy — under continued pressure in this crypto bear market — released a new set of metrics to judge company performance.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap 7-day inflow streak with $225M in outflows
item.description: After attracting nearly $1 billion over seven trading sessions, US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their first daily net outflow since July 13.

item.title: Ripple’s RLUSD gets two boosts as transfer volume drops 25%
item.description: Ripple launched an institutional minting platform and added RLUSD to Notabene’s compliance network as holder growth rose but monthly transfer volume fell to $10.95 billion.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Mirae plans to turn crypto exchange Korbit into something Korea hasn't seen before
item.description: The South Korean financial giant says its Korbit – soon to be rebranded as Digital X – is just the starting point for a broader ecosystem that connects RWAs, stablecoins and digital assets.

item.title: BitMEX hit with 623 BTC lawsuit on day it announces shutdown
item.description: The proposed class action alleges BitMEX used privileged trading access and server freezes to profit from forced liquidations.

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $65,000 as $800 billion AI selloff leaves crypto largely untouched
item.description: The Magnificent Seven had their worst day since April 2025 after Alphabet and Tesla spooked investors on AI spending. Bitcoin fell less than 1%, and dogecoin led the majors lower.

item.title: Dem senator calls GOP’s CLARITY ethics proposal a ‘piece of s---’: Politico
item.description: On Wednesday, Senate Republicans released the proposed text for the CLARITY Act, which has been met with pushback from Democrats regarding ethics provisions.

item.title: BitMEX delists 65 trading pairs, derivatives in July amid exchange shutdown
item.description: BitMEX will have removed 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs in July, compared with just 19 across the first six months of the year.

item.title: SEC sets September talks on move toward 24-hour stock trading
item.description: Nasdaq, Cboe and the London Stock Exchange are among major exchanges moving toward longer trading hours.

item.title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
item.description: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

item.title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
item.description: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

item.title: We created a Bitcoin Staking Roadmap page 🟠 Track everything related to Bitcoin Staking: timelines, links, posts, and updates as they ship leading up to the official launch. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ZVHpSdkRhOEdXYW1SZU5mMTBvTE1qZkZDaG1WeDFPU2R2WUdNYWdERFBDb1gxbERsa0ZjUUJpRXVvZmMzdkszeW9Ecmt3OXBRc19mZFp6RjJldmM?oc=5" target="_blank">We created a Bitcoin Staking Roadmap page �…

item.title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
item.description: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

item.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
item.description: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

item.title: Clarity Act expected to miss its window before Congress' summer break, leadership says
item.description: The deadline to get the crypto market structure bill done before senators scatter will likely be missed, says Majority Leader Thune, though it may get a start before then.

item.title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
item.description: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

item.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
item.description: The deleted post touted a bogus "Vladhood" token as the mascot of Robinhood Chain—the latest fraud to exploit a network currently dominated by memes.

item.title: List of DATs who have abandoned Bitcoin and crypto accumulation strategies since: 🔴 Full Liquidations / Complete Exits Satsuma Technology (SATS LN) — Shareholders voted on July 21, 2026 (>>90% approval) to liquid all 668 BTC (~$43.5M), return capital - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBneTBlR2M3RDV1eGxsdFctckg5RkZEc0o2bk01RlNyak1KVUNMbG1WMUJxbHhudDFyOWtMUjhoN3hMbUFoT3NlVTJDUFFHTUFGZVBtcWFWQVFNRVNHN0RBMUlYMWc?oc=5" target="_blank">List of DATs who have abandoned…

item.title: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
item.description: The crypto asset manager thinks the four-year cycle is dead, suggesting Bitcoin's price will follow macro forces and the Fed's next move.

item.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X account hacked to promote token amid memecoin frenzy
item.description: The post, now deleted, touted a token called $VLAD and falsely claimed it would be listed on Robinhood.

item.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street locks them out
item.description: The former Signet developer aims to launch early next year a marketplace connecting stablecoin issuers with regional lenders to manage reserves.

item.title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
item.description: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

item.title: Coinbase's corporate customers can now accept payments from AI agents
item.description: Rolling out this week, Coinbase Business users will be able to accept payments from AI agents, done via the x402 protocol, developed and incubated by the exchange.

item.title: Binance is the first crypto exchange to partner with @STOPTHETRAFFIK to help disrupt crypto flows linked to human trafficking and child exploitation. This partnership reflects our commitment to helping protect the broader ecosystem, strengthen trust across th - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5lNHZJZkV3ZGpyWXNxdFBHNGpCQm0tMElvQTZ6WE1SLWJjUHZTVFVFb09IRUhIaS1EMmIyQk1IczU0N2ZlcG1SVkt4d0RuRTBfNXJJOFc0Y1o3S3kz?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance is the first crypto exchange to pa…

item.title: The SEC settles with Coinbase over its missing Gary Gensler texts
item.description: A new court status report reveals the agency will pay a flat fee to resolve a two-year fight over what former Chair Gary Gensler knew about Ethereum.

item.title: There's a difference between knowing crypto and knowing your crypto. General AI like ChatGPT or Claude can answer technical questions. heyAura understands what you hold and what actually matters to you. The best financial insights are personal. Your AI - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBISDhPOWpEVVY3anlWdWFKWEVJTElpZXdfQ2wtSjl1cVdlcENINC1rVE9XanB2MjRPcW42WjljNEVYaFVIMFJrVkhoMS1RczdPdE5jTFZpc19oMU9n?oc=5" target="_blank">There's a difference between knowing crypt…

item.title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
item.description: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

item.title: New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $BILL (Billions Network) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9TYVBPZzRBRjNVc1ExTHA4RDBrTzM1RUtHTnpYY084cGd2Mk5KWWNyNjAwZWVVRTY2TFJnQnBpWW1EOXhJOUdnemdqNmRseVdtY0JWX0hxV1Q4NlZHQy1qekk2Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: NEW: @Lombard_Finance adopts Chainlink to unlock cross-chain distribution for its Bitcoin Onchain Credit Strategy with @FlowTraders (Euronext: FLOW). Chainlink now powers secure cross-chain deposits of BTC.b and LBTC into the Strategy, expanding ac - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE96T1lnbHJzYW1YY2RkWG1PSWhpVVlVMU01QjdyX0JYVHQ5MlN4YzhzZEpoV1ZoU0pJZl9makU2OWl6Qk85WGdTU2NXXzJ6RkdfQl80MnhOTlpEbUctZ3dZ?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: @Lombard_Finance adopts Chainlink…

item.title: Sad to see BitMex go. Some thoughts: BitMex pioneered 100x perps in crypto back in 2014. Delivery futures existed before then, making Fridays hectic. BTC deposits only, one chain only, withdrawals only once per day, through a multi-sig wallet. The constraint - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFB0VVZUQTQzNVpGX2wyTDNqMUZYWTdscTJ5LW56Y1BWNXFwSExfUTFnLVR6S2xobGg4SG1XYlhUWWthWWxFS3RBU1JhMHlQTk5KcURoZThmM3llQlJJeHdpRA?oc=5" target="_blank">Sad to see BitMex go. Some thoughts:…
